contract.name: voiStarcraft2 MicroMachine production map pool
notes: Production support is the explicit required pool, not every custom SC2 map.
Diagnostic maps collect blocker evidence and never count as production signoff.

maps.reason: Known local MicroMachine macro and race-matrix evidence exists.
maps.promotion_rule: Keep in required pool while production matrix remains failed=0.

maps.reason: Known MicroMachine map-support blocker: ramp/wall-off/placement path produced no_production_deadlock.
maps.promotion_rule: Promote only after Issue 48.3 proves 12k-frame macro soak with failed=0 and no allow-failures.

maps.reason: Placeholder class for maps outside the declared production and diagnostic pools.
maps.promotion_rule: Move to diagnostic first, collect preflight/soak evidence, then promote to required only after failed=0 production evidence.

smoke.description: Fast required-pool verification for local smoke iteration.

production.description: Current production qualification tier before expanded map hardening.

diagnostic.description: Known blockers and unqualified maps; never production signoff.
